display.purpose: Hero and page H1 only. 700, tight tracking, balanced wrap, white.

body.purpose: Default prose in mist-200; subtitles in mist-300. Cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Eyebrow pill and small overlines only. Uppercase, 0.18em tracking.

shadows.name: glow
shadows.purpose: Cyan status-light halo under the primary CTA / hero focal element. One per view.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Soft ambient floor under container cards. Never a hard drop shadow.

motion.name: floaty
motion.purpose: Gentle idle float on decorative/hero graphics.

motion.name: fade-up
motion.purpose: Entrance for above-the-fold content. Enhances an already-visible default.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions. No bounce, no elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one lit action. Cyan gradient (solid brand-400 is the on-brand target), dark text, cyan glow, hover lift.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">Brezplačni posvet<svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: linear-gradient(to right, #16bfe0, #8b5cf6); color: #070a12; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(61,214,245,0.18), 0 20px 60px -20px rgba(6,163,196,0.45); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #3dd6f5; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The quiet secondary action. Translucent fill, hairline border, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); color: #ffffff; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Faint translucent lift over the ink surface. Soft 24px corners, hairline border, ambient floor shadow. Never frosted glass, never nested.
components.html:
Ena aplikacija za vse

Shelly, Sonoff, Aqara in Philips Hue — vse v Home Assistant, brez vezanosti na proizvajalca.
components.css: .ds-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 1.5rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.04) inset, 0 20px 50px -25px rgba(0,0,0,0.8); } .ds-card-title { color: #ffffff; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { color: #cdd6e6; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.65; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Translucent field with a soft cyan focus — border shift plus ring, no hard outline.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out, box-shadow 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7a96; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: rgba(22,191,224,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(22,191,224,0.2); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: 14px medium link. Quiet mist default, white on hover, cyan when active.
components.html: FunkcionalnostiCenikO nas
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-link { color: #9fadc6; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #86e9ff; }

components.name: Eyebrow Pill
components.description: Signature overline pill — use sparingly, never above every section.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.18em; color: #86e9ff; }

narrative.overview: This is the interface of a well-run system you trust to run your home quietly. Dark, layered, precise — everything in its place. The premium, high-tech surface exists to signal competence, never to perform coolness. A skeptical Slovenian homeowner should read the screen as 'these people know exactly what they're doing,' then feel calm, not dazzled. High-tech in service of trust. Density is generous and unhurried: wide gutters, deliberate vertical rhythm, one idea per section. The layered ink surfaces give quiet depth; the electric cyan brand is the single point of energy, used like a status light — sparingly, so it means something. This system explicitly rejects the 'giga-modern' AI-slop lane it grew out of (gradient text, an eyebrow above every section, glassmorphism as the default card) and cold sci-fi neon-on-black futurism alike. The answer to both is restraint: fewer effects, executed precisely.
keyCharacteristics: Dark, layered ink surfaces (five-step ink ramp) for quiet depth.
Electric cyan as a rare status-light accent; violet only as occasional glow.
Single humanist-adjacent sans (Inter) across the whole scale; hierarchy by weight and size, not by pairing.
Fully rounded pills for actions; soft 24px cards for containers.
Motion is gentle and functional (float, fade-up), never bouncy or elastic.

rules.name: The Status-Light Rule
rules.body: Electric cyan appears on ≤10% of any screen and marks exactly one thing at a time — the primary action, the active state, the live signal. Its rarity is what makes it read as 'on.'

rules.name: The Cyan-Leads Rule
rules.body: Cyan is the only accent voice. Violet is permitted only as a low-opacity gradient/glow companion behind cyan, never as an equal second color and never on an interactive element.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Never introduce a second font family. Contrast comes from weight (400 body vs. 700 display) and size.

rules.name: The Legibility-Floor Rule
rules.body: Body text is never lighter than mist-300 (#9fadc6) on ink surfaces. mist-400 is for incidental supporting text only. Verify ≥4.5:1.

rules.name: The Ambient-Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth reads through the ink ramp + a 1px inset highlight first; the deep shadow is a whisper beneath it. If a card looks like it has a hard drop shadow, the shadow is wrong.

rules.name: The One-Glow Rule
rules.body: The cyan glow shadow marks one element per view. Two glowing things collapse the status-light meaning.

dos: Do treat electric cyan as a status light — one lit thing per view, ≤10% of the surface.
Do build depth from the ink ramp + translucency + the ambient card shadow; keep shadows a whisper.
Do carry hierarchy with Inter weight and size alone.
Do keep dark text on cyan buttons and verify body text ≥4.5:1; mist-400 is incidental only.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce alternative; keep motion gentle, easing out, never bouncing.
Do keep contact sparing and calm — earn the click by building confidence.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text on a gradient); use a single solid color, emphasis via weight/size.
Don't put an uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section; vary the cadence.
Don't default to glassmorphism; cards are faint translucent lifts, blur is for the sticky header and mobile menu only.
Don't let violet become a second CTA or accent color.
Don't tip cyan into cold sci-fi neon or add HUD/spaceship motifs.
Don't introduce a second font family, fear-selling/urgency copy, or the SaaS hero-metric template.
Don't nest cards inside cards, or use a border-left/border-right >1px colored stripe as a decorative accent.
